softwareStatementId.description: Unique identifier of the software statement

softwareStatementExpiresAt.description: Timestamp when the software statement expires

isGlobalTemplate.description: Whether this is a global template statement

title.description: Human readable title describing the expiry status
title.example: Software statement abc123 for sw-abc is expiring on 2030-01-01T00:00:00.000Z

recommendation.description: Actionable recommendation for the tenant regarding the expiring or expired software statement
recommendation.example: Your software statement expires on 2030-01-01T00:00:00.000Z. Please create a new software statement before the expiry date.
